heading: Disposition of money accruing from lapsed salaries or unused appropriations for salaries
label: 5501 Disposition of money accruing from lapsed salaries or unused appropriations for salaries
text: Money accruing from lapsed salaries or from unused appropriations for salaries shall be covered into the Treasury of the United States. An individual who violates this section shall be removed from the service.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large (1st sentence; and 2d sentence, so much as relates to removal).5 U.S.C. 50(297th through 316th words), .Aug. 5, 1882, ch. 389, § 422 Stat. 255(so much as relates to removal), .Aug. 23, 1912, ch. 350, § 537 Stat. 414In the last sentence, the word “removed” is substituted for “summarily removed” because of the provisions of the Lloyd-LaFollette Act , as amended, and the Veterans’ Preference Act of 1944, , as amended, which are carried into this title.37 Stat. 55558 Stat. 387Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
